zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Blount II, of Sodington於1345年之後出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾索丁頓時，他的父親Sir John Blount I8701歲，母親Iseult Mountjoy8692歲。他於大約1374年與Juliana Fowleshurst在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾索丁頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1425年4月4日在英國武斯特斯爾馬布爾，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾馬布爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Blount II, of Sodington于1345年之后出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾索丁頓时，他的父亲Sir John Blount I8701岁，母亲Iseult Mountjoy8692岁。他于大约1374年与Juliana Fowleshurst在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾索丁頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1425年4月4日在英国武斯特斯爾馬布爾，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾馬布爾。

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Blount II, of Sodington was born after 1345, in Sodington, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Blount I, was 8701 and his mother, Iseult Mountjoy, was 8692. He married Juliana Fowleshurst about 1374, in Sodington, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 4 April 1425, in Mamble, Worcestershire, England, and was buried in Mamble, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Blount II, of Sodington est né après 1345, à Sodington, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Blount I, avait 8701 ans et sa mère, Iseult Mountjoy, avait 8692 ans. Il a épousé Juliana Fowleshurst environ 1374, à Sodington, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 4 avril 1425, à Mamble, Worcestershire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Mamble, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Blount II, of Sodington nach 1345 in Sodington, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Blount I 8701 und seine Mutter Iseult Mountjoy 8692. Er hat um 1374 in Sodington, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Juliana Fowleshurst geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 4. April 1425 in Mamble, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Mamble, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Blount II, of Sodington è nato il dopo il 1345 nel Sodington, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Blount I, aveva 8701 anni e il suo madre, Iseult Mountjoy, aveva 8692 anni. Lui sposato Juliana Fowleshurst circa 1374, nel Sodington, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 4 aprile 1425, nel Mamble, Worcestershire, England, e fu sepolto a Mamble, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Blount II, of Sodingtonが1345年以後にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアソディントンで生まれた時，父Sir John Blount Iは8701歳，母Iseult Mountjoyは8692歳であった。約1374年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアソディントンでJuliana Fowleshurstと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1425年4月4日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアマンブルで死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアマンブルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Blount II, of Sodington(이)가 1345년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 소딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Blount I(은)는 8701세였고, 그의 어머니 Iseult Mountjoy(은)는 8692세였다. 그는 대략 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 소딩턴에서 Juliana Fowleshurst(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1425년 4월 4일 영국 워스스터실르 맘블일에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 맘블일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Blount II, of Sodington nasceu após 1345, em Sodington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Blount I, tinha 8701 anos e sua mãe, Iseult Mountjoy, tinha 8692 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana Fowleshurst aproximadamente 1374, em Sodington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 4 de abril de 1425, em Mamble, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Mamble, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Blount II, of Sodington родился после 1345 г. в местности содингтон, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Blount I было 8701 год, а матери, которую звали Iseult Mountjoy, 8692. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana Fowleshurst около 1374 г. в местности содингтон, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 4 апреля 1425 г. в местности мамбл, ворсестиршир, Англия и был похоронен в местности мамбл, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Blount II, of Sodington nació después de 1345, en Sodington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Blount I, tenía 8701 años y su mamá, Iseult Mountjoy, tenía 8692 años. Se casó con Juliana Fowleshurst aproximadamente 1374, en Sodington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 4 de abril de 1425, en Mamble, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Mamble, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
